title: Light Leak
description: A resource pack that aims to make lightsources such as torches and lanterns cinematic and visually pleasing!
body:
![Light Leak Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f477edde19cade83ddead3f9cf6b9a0ee02af2a.png)

Did you ever feel like minecrafts lightsources looked a bit boring? Say no more!

Light Leaks main feature are **coloured light shimmers, light cones and light spots** added to the lightsources in minecraft!

Additionally it slightly changes the models of minecrafts lightsources to look more **realistic** and **visually pleasing**, while staying true to minecrafts vision!

**Here is how torches look ingame! (V1.0, look in the Gallery for the newer look)**

![Torches ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0af636c4405822cc7ad144726fe618e0fef6f367.gif)

_Using the pack could lead to some performance issues, due to more particles and more complex block- and itemmodels being rendered._

**The following blocks/items are currently affected by Light Leak:**
- All Torches
- All Lanterns
- Chains
- Comparators
- Repeaters
- Rails
- Activator rails
- Detector rails
- Powered rails
- Redstone lamps
- Copper bulbs
- Furnaces
- Blast Furnaces
- Smokers
- Lava Cauldrons
- Fire
- Soul Fire
- All Candles
- Lava
- Shroomlights
- Glowstone
- Froglights
- Sea Lanterns
- Nether Portals
- Pumpkins
- Carved Pumpkins
- Jack O' Lanterns

_As long as your shader supports the added particles there is no reason why the pack shoudn't work with them. Try for yourself!_

**Several Mods are required for all of Light Leaks features to work!**
[You can find the list of required mods here.](https://modrinth.com/collection/lWa3Lco6)

![Polytone required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74cedb1236603fbeb359c9fa1d601446f4014261.webp)
